content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic Daily Update (Apr 12, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 12, 2026, focused on maintaining codebase stability and cleaning up the repository. The team addressed a critical TypeScript compatibility issue in the core utilities and performed a comprehensive sweep to close stale issues, feature requests, and third-party plugin proposals, streamlining the project's focus.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **TypeScript Compatibility Fixes**
    *   Resolved a `TS2769` error by casting the `emitEvent` payload to `EventPayload` to ensure compatibility with the `@elizaos/core` alpha.115 update, as `MODEL_USED` is no longer a recognized key in `EventPayloadMap`. ([#16](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/pull/16))

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None.

## CLOSED ISSUES

*   **Repository Maintenance and Stale Issue Cleanup**
    *   Closed numerous long-standing issues (8+ months old) including V3 goals, security roles, Twitter mention bugs, documentation errors, and various feature requests for streaming, multi-tenancy, and chain integrations. ([#5386](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/5386), [#4720](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/4720), [#4921](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/4921), [#4855](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/4855), [#4908](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/4908), [#4909](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/4909), [#5060](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/5060), [#4947](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/4947), [#4997](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/4997), [#5155](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/5155), [#5172](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/5172), [#5183](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/5183), [#5181](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/5181), [#5244](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/5244))
*   **Third-Party Plugin Proposal Management**
    *   Closed multiple integration proposals, directing contributors to develop and publish third-party plugins independently under the `elizaOS-plugins` organization. ([#6634](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6634), [#6635](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6635), [#6640](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6640), [#6644](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6644), [#6646](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6646), [#6668](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6668), [#6688](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6688), [#6695](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6695), [#6699](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6699), [#6700](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6700), [#6707](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6707), [#6706](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6706), [#6708](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6708), [#6711](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6711), [#6548](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6548), [#6581](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6581))

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#6514](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/issues/6514) Inter-Agent Coordination:** This discussion thread explored the challenges of multi-agent coordination, specifically capability exchange and persistent peer relationships. Participants discussed using on-chain credentials and behavioral history (via WTRMRK or InsumerAPI) to establish trust anchors across different agent instances, highlighting the need for a standardized way for agents to verify peer reliability and capability before hand-offs.
